historical_notes: Cen Peng was a general of Liu Xiu. Cen Peng was loyal and contributed significantly to Liu Xiu’s success. Liu Xiu executed Can Peng, along with Yao Qi, Deng Yu, Chen Jun, and Du Mao by mistake while drunk. Liu Xiu later died of this grief.

full_text:
Cen Peng 岑彭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cen Peng (岑彭)was born in Zaoyang. Eastern Han general who served Liu Xiu. Executed by Liu Xiu in a drunken mistake. Cen Peng was affiliated with the Eastern Han Dynasty. Cen Peng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:23
BiographyHistoric (Unverified)
Cen Peng was a general of Liu Xiu. Cen Peng was loyal and contributed significantly to Liu Xiu’s success. Liu Xiu executed Can Peng, along with Yao Qi, Deng Yu, Chen Jun, and Du Mao by mistake while drunk. Liu Xiu later died of this grief.
